understanding.goal_understanding: Complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by satisfying each level's win condition, typically by maneuvering pushable objects onto goal tiles marked '+', progressing until the entire run reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece exactly one cell (3 pixels) in the direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects (blocks) if unobstructed; walls and obstacles block movement variably based on their properties; CLICK switches control to another selectable piece by specifying its exact pixel position [x, y], instantly relocating selection there without consuming extra movement steps beyond the action itself.
